standard_variable.semantic_intent: non-CRRT renal replacement therapy active state
standard_variable.semantic_grain: one row per positive state episode

source_status_codes: non-CRRT ambiguous active dialysis evidence resolved to non_crrt_rrt
database_mapping.source_start_field: charttime or procedure starttime after approved intervalization
database_mapping.source_end_field: charttime plus non-CRRT modality carry window or procedure endtime after approved intervalization
database_mapping.source_grain: one official RRT point row or one dialysis procedure interval row before non-CRRT support-episode union
database_mapping.target_grain: one retained positive non-CRRT support state episode row

identifier_normalization.subject_id_role: patient-level identifier from trusted stay map
identifier_normalization.hadm_id_role: hospital-admission-level identifier from trusted stay map
identifier_normalization.stay_id_role: ICU-stay-level identifier from official RRT sources, ICU procedureevents, and trusted stay map

included_scope: approved IHD and peritoneal procedure intervals
non-CRRT ambiguous active dialysis evidence resolved to non-CRRT RRT
mapping_specific_notes: Opening MIMIC v1 is IHD plus peritoneal dialysis for non-CRRT support.
Hybrid or prolonged-intermittent modalities are not claimed as fully captured unless they are represented by the approved source labels.
adjacent_status_boundary.boundary_reason: This same-name variable represents non-CRRT RRT active support, not any-RRT support, CRRT-family support, exact modality truth, fluid-removal measurement, first-day summary, free-day outcome, AKI stage, or renal SOFA phenotype.

state_episode_build_translation.positive_state_translation: retain MIMIC IHD and peritoneal active evidence from official RRT sources and approved dialysis procedure intervals, plus reviewed non-CRRT ambiguous evidence
state_episode_build_translation.episode_start_translation: use merged support_starttime after approved point-carry and procedure intervalization
state_episode_build_translation.episode_end_translation: use merged support_endtime after approved point-carry and procedure intervalization
state_episode_build_translation.continuity_translation: merge overlapping or exactly contiguous approved non-CRRT source intervals within stay; any positive gap starts a new support episode
state_episode_build_translation.no_row_translation: absence of a retained row means no positive non-CRRT RRT episode under this source-evidence rule

validation_contract.positive_only_no_row_policy_check: false rows are not emitted; absence of row is not universal proof of no non-CRRT RRT support or no RRT
notes: The retained source is a reviewed local RRT support-state foundation built from official MIMIC RRT derived evidence and dialysis procedure intervals.
Opening v1 is a non-CRRT active-state child of the any-RRT parent.
Exact modality, CRRT-family, umbrella any-RRT, first-day summary, fluid-removal, and free-day outputs remain separate variables.

execution_contract.formal_output_rule: The governed execution.py entrypoint should read this mapping spec and delegate to the current local reviewed implementation until a more fully spec-native runner replaces it.
execution_contract.non_bypassable_target_rule: Formal std_non_crrt_rrt_active outputs for MIMIC-IV-3.1 should be produced only through the governed execution.py path rather than side SQL or ad hoc rebuilds.
